{{Infobox location
| name = Akura tower
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Akura tower]] is at least eight stories high and made of dark purple wood.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Akura tower]] trembled during the match.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Akura tower]] is located in the [[Ninecloud Court]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
